    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedDate], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[OrderCode], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[ShippingTrackingNumber], [o].[ShopId], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedDate], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[Address], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[ContactNumber], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[IsActive], [a].[IsSeller], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[Name], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[StoreName], [a].[TaxNumber], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [s].[Id] AS [Id1], [s].[Address] AS [Address0], [s].[ContactNumber] AS [ContactNumber0], [s].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [s].[Name] AS [Name0], [s].[SellerId], [s].[Status] AS [Status0], [s].[TaxNumber] AS [TaxNumber0]

    INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [o].[CustomerId] = [a].[Id]

) AS [t]
